violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen AND bar was blocked by equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC moved the items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food choppers and tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and/or debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took to dish sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Food prep containers were not properly airdried as evidence by water/moisture. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The following was observed in poor repair in the kitchen area: - Small food prep unit (lid does not close properly) - 2 door refrigerator unit (not in service - service call was placed previous to inspection) New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris: - chip container - food prep containers (old sticker residue) - prep units - bar lowboy cooler/glass chiller Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The floors in the beverage cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
Hotel pans were observed stored stacked with water in between pans. Equipment and utensils must be airdried after sanitation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the storage shed area. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the exterior of chest freezer and chip holder have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Faucet at prep sink was observed leaking. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
